com._1c.v8.ibis.admin

Interface IClusterServiceInfo


  • public interface IClusterServiceInfo
    Cluster service description interface

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      List<UUID> getClusterManagerIds()
      Gets the list of IDs of cluster managers to which the service is assigned
      String getDescr()
      Gets the service description
      int getMainOnly()
      Gets the flag that indicates whether the service is supported by both main and additional cluster manager
      String getName()
      Gets the service name

    • Method Detail

      • getName

        String getName()
        Gets the service name
        Returns:
        service name

      • getDescr

        String getDescr()
        Gets the service description
        Returns:
        service description

      • getMainOnly

        int getMainOnly()
        Gets the flag that indicates whether the service is supported by both main and additional cluster manager
        Returns:
        1 - if the service is supported by the main cluster manager only and cannot be moved to the additional cluster manager process
        0 - if the service is supported by both main and additional cluster managers

      • getClusterManagerIds

        List<UUID> getClusterManagerIds()
        Gets the list of IDs of cluster managers to which the service is assigned
        Returns:
        list of cluster manager IDs
